outcome_summary: Explored selling digital products. Identified friction in original n8n automation bundle plan: complex workflows + long lead time to launch. Decided to pivot.
next_step: Research what Indian solopreneurs actually buy.
open_questions: Should we stick with n8n bundles or pivot to guides?

outcome_summary: Research showed Indian freelancers buy: tax compliance, pricing guides, AI prompts, tool stacks, business OS. Validated via Gumroad/Payhip (Easlo Freelance OS, Tom Hirst Pricing, A Financial Notion 6k+ users). Locked 5-product roadmap.
next_step: Design zero-cost architecture so any AI agent can run the business.

outcome_summary: Made architecture agent-agnostic: GitHub as source of truth (no Supabase). Free API rotation: Gemini Mon/Thu, Groq Tue/Fri, OpenRouter Wed/Sat, NVIDIA NIM Sun. Any model can operate the business.
next_step: Finalize file structure + Daily Agent contract.

outcome_summary: Locked GitHub-as-DB pattern: ledger.json + sales-tracker.md with _ledger.js helper + SHA retry. Defined Daily AI Agent routine + Layer-2 24/7 workers (lead scoring, event logging).
next_step: Wire Cloudflare env vars + write the Daily Agent prompt.

session_title: Environment variables and API keys configuration
outcome_summary: Configured Cloudflare env vars. Identified GA4 needs NUMERIC Property ID (not G-ID) for Data API. Razorpay account previously rejected as 'lead-gen' — re-described as 'digital product sales'. Pivoted from generic prompts to high-value automation bundles using n8n + AppScript.
open_questions: Is Brevo key SMTP v3 or OAuth?

session_title: Exposed GitHub PAT security warning + pre-launch fixes
outcome_summary: Validated demand for all 5 products on Gumroad/Payhip. Built coming-soon waitlist on every product page. Wired live GA4 + Razorpay + Clarity + Brevo + GitHub data into admin dashboard. PR #3 (pre-launch-fixes) and PR #4 (coming-soon-and-waitlist) opened. Domain recommendation: freelanceros.in from BigRock (~₹300/yr). Email still broken without custom domain — deferred. PAT was exposed in chat — flagged for rotation.
next_step: Merge PR #3 then PR #4. Finish enhanced-frontend (index-enhanced.html exists; need enhanced-style.css + enhanced-animations.js with GSAP + Three.js). Then fix 3 config issues: RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET, ADMIN_PASSWORD/ADMIN_TOKEN_SECRET, BREVO_API_KEY (use SMTP v3 xkeysib- key, not OAuth), numeric GA4_PROPERTY_ID.
open_questions: Author Tax Guide 2026-27 first (highest demand) or AI Guide first (flagship)?
Rotate the exposed PAT now or after this work batch?

outcome_summary: Analyzed repo via PAT: PR #3 and PR #4 were already merged into main (commits 93340e4 + 4cdafc1). Designed /context/ folder with 3 append-only JSONL files (claude-sessions, daily-agent-log, worker-events). Wrote universal Claude resume prompt + updated Daily Agent v3.0 prompt. All seeded with the 7 historical session_end entries.
next_step: In next Claude chat: paste universal resume prompt. It will fetch /context/*.jsonl tails and continue from here. First task should be enhanced-style.css + enhanced-animations.js (PRs are already merged so that work is unblocked).
